name: VR Frame Budget (Quest 3 72Hz)
description: Measures per-frame computation budget on a 300-frame headless simulation. Loads basic-scene and multiplayer-vr scenarios via HoloScriptRuntime and measures wall-clock time per update tick. Target: Quest 3 @ 72Hz = 13.9ms budget per frame.
note: Runs headless (no GPU). Measures CPU-side update + scene-graph tick time only. GPU overhead is not captured here; use GPU profiling for render pipeline regressions.
